trivia_bullets.text: Shatterskull is a volcanic ridge in Akoum, Zendikar's most geologically violent continent. The Ally type line on a BFZ creature is Wizards' canonical mechanical encoding of Zendikari Resistance membership — this Giant joined the multi-race coalition Gideon assembled at Sea Gate (kor, humans, elves, merfolk, goblins, vampires).

"Saved from certain death by the kor, he considers himself bound to them by an unbreakable blood oath." The Giant's coalition membership is framed as personal debt rather than ideology — modeling BFZ's recurring design pattern that the Resistance is a collection of personal obligations and survival bonds, not unified ideology.

A 4/4 Menace for five mana ({3}{R}{R}). Included in the 'Rallying Cry' BFZ intro pack centered on the Ally + Rally mechanic. Menace makes this Giant difficult to block profitably given its stat line, functioning as a top-end threat rather than a Rally-trigger synergy piece.
sources: WebSearch: Shatterskull Recruit BFZ intro packs MTGSalvation

trivia_bullets.text: Zendikari Resistance roster verdict: CANONICAL. Ally type line + flavor text depicting coalition integration via blood oath both meet the bar for wiring to the zendikari-resistance character node.
